seoTitle: Arts / Humanities after 10th — courses, exams & careers | SkillKite
seoDescription: After 10th Arts — humanities streams, law, design, government-job tracks

guide.heading: SkillKite — 10th ke baad aapke options
guide.greeting: Hi there! Aapne bataya ki aapko Arts mein interest hai aur aap study bhi karna chahte ho aur earning bhi start karna chahte ho. Neeche aapke liye best options pehle diye hain — saare options bhi neeche hain taaki aap compare kar sako.

sections.title: Study options
sections.intro: Sabse relevant option upar hai — but baaki options bhi padhna important hai.

options.name: 12th Arts / Humanities
options.whatIsIt: History, Geography, Political Science, Sociology, Psychology, Fine Arts, jaise subjects padhte ho. Bahut flexible stream hai — creativity aur thinking dono ko space milti hai.
options.whoFor: Jo students writing, society, culture, media, law, ya creative fields mein interested hain. Arts lovers ke liye yeh most natural choice hai.
options.leadsTo: Journalism, Law (CLAT), Teaching (B.Ed), Social Work, Psychology (BA/MA), Fine Arts, Mass Communication, Civil Services (UPSC), Literature — bahut wide range hai.
options.keyExams: CLAT (Law ke liye), DU Entrance (CUET), State University Entrances, NID/NID entrances (Design ke liye)

options.name: 12th Commerce
options.whatIsIt: Accounts, Business Studies, Economics padhte ho. Agar aapko business, money, aur markets samajhna accha lagta hai toh yeh ek solid option hai.
options.whoFor: Students jo business ya finance mein jaana chahte hain, ya jo Maths se thoda dur rehna chahte hain (Math optional hai).
options.leadsTo: CA (Chartered Accountant), BBA, B.Com, MBA, Banking, Finance, Entrepreneurship
options.keyExams: CA Foundation (ICAI), CUET, IPM Entrance (IIM ke liye early entry), BBA entrances

options.name: 12th Science with Maths (PCM)
options.whatIsIt: Physics, Chemistry, Maths — engineering aur tech ke liye standard path. Padhai demanding hai, preparation strong chahiye.
options.whoFor: Jo students Maths mein genuinely strong hain aur engineering/tech explore karna chahte hain. Arts interest ke saath yeh mismatch ho sakta hai — soch samajh ke lo.
options.leadsTo: Engineering (B.Tech), Architecture, Data Science, Defence (NDA), Pilot
options.keyExams: JEE Main, JEE Advanced, NDA, BITSAT, State CETs

options.name: 12th Science with Biology (PCB)
options.whatIsIt: Physics, Chemistry, Biology — medical aur life sciences ka path. Bohot competitive hai, especially NEET ke liye.
options.whoFor: Jo students doctor ya healthcare professional banna chahte hain. Arts interest ke saath sirf tab choose karo agar medical field genuinely pasand ho.
options.leadsTo: MBBS, BDS, BAMS, Nursing, Pharmacy, Biotechnology
options.keyExams: NEET-UG (extremely competitive — lakhs students, limited seats), AIIMS alag se nahi hota ab

options.name: 12th Science with Maths + Biology (PCMB)
options.whatIsIt: PCM aur PCB dono ek saath — maximum flexibility milti hai but workload bhi sabse zyada hota hai.
options.whoFor: Jo students abhi decide nahi kar paaye ki engineering lena hai ya medical. Honest advice: yeh path bohot heavy hai, sirf tab lo agar genuinely dono fields mein interest ho.
options.leadsTo: Engineering ya Medical — dono options open rehte hain

options.name: Polytechnic Diploma (3 years, direct after 10th)
options.whatIsIt: 10th ke baad seedha technical diploma kar sakte ho — Civil, Electrical, Mechanical, Computer Science jaisi branches hoti hain. College se sasta aur jaldi job milti hai.
options.whoFor: Jo students practical/technical kaam mein interested hain aur jaldi earning shuru karna chahte hain. Arts interest ke saath Computer Science ya Multimedia Diploma relevant ho sakta hai.
options.leadsTo: Junior Engineer, Technician jobs, ya B.Tech (lateral entry — 2nd year mein seedha jaate ho)
options.keyExams: State Polytechnic Entrance Exam (har state ka alag hota hai — UP JEECUP, Delhi CET, etc.)

options.name: Paramedical Diploma after 10th
options.whatIsIt: DMLT, ANM, X-Ray Technician, Dental Assistant jaise short healthcare diplomas hain. Science background zaruri nahi sab mein.
options.whoFor: Jo students healthcare mein jaana chahte hain without doing full MBBS. Arts interest ke saath yeh slightly off-track ho sakta hai — but earning perspective se option hai.
options.leadsTo: Hospital jobs, Diagnostic Labs, Clinics — relatively quick employment
options.keyExams: State-level paramedical entrances ya direct admission (institution pe depend karta hai)

sections.title: Job & earning options
sections.intro: Yeh sab 10th ke baad start ho sakti hain — study ke saath bhi kar sakte ho part-time. Arts background wale students ke liye kuch options bohot well suited hain.

options.name: Content Creation (YouTube / Instagram / Writing)
options.whatIsIt: Apni creativity use karke videos, reels, blogs, ya stories banao. Arts students ke liye yeh most natural earning path hai. Shuru mein income slow hoti hai — patience chahiye.
options.whoFor: Jo students creative hain — drawing, writing, storytelling, ya speaking mein interest ho. Consistency sabse important cheez hai.
options.leadsTo: Full-time creator, Brand collaborations, Freelance writing, Social Media Manager
options.timeCommitment: Part-time se shuru karo — 6-12 mahine mein results aate hain

options.name: Graphic Design (Canva / Figma)
options.whatIsIt: Logo, poster, social media graphics banana sikho. Canva free hai aur beginners ke liye easy hai. Arts students iske liye naturally talented hote hain.
options.whoFor: Jo students visually creative hain aur digital tools seekhne mein interested hain.
options.leadsTo: Freelance designer, Small business clients, Fiverr/Upwork pe gigs, aage UX/UI Designer
options.timeCommitment: 1-3 mahine mein basic skills seekh sakte ho

options.name: Photography / Videography
options.whatIsIt: Events, portraits, ya products ke photos/videos lena. Mobile se bhi start ho sakta hai. Arts sense yahan bahut kaam aata hai.
options.whoFor: Jo students visually observant hain aur storytelling mein interest rakhte hain.
options.leadsTo: Freelance photographer, Wedding/event shoots, Stock photography income, YouTube/Instagram creator
options.timeCommitment: Practice-based — 3-6 mahine mein paid work mil sakta hai

options.name: Tailoring / Stitching
options.whatIsIt: Kapde silna, alterations karna, ya fashion designing ki basics seekhna. Skill seekhne ke baad ghar se bhi kaam ho sakta hai.
options.whoFor: Jo students fashion ya handwork mein interested hain aur practical kaam prefer karte hain.
options.leadsTo: Home-based tailoring business, Boutique work, Aage Fashion Designing course

options.name: Meesho / Online Reselling
options.whatIsIt: Meesho ya similar apps pe products resell karo bina inventory rakhe. Zero investment se start ho sakta hai.
options.whoFor: Jo students business mindset rakhte hain aur social network use karna jaante hain.
options.leadsTo: Small online business, Entrepreneurship skills, Pocket money from day one
options.timeCommitment: Part-time — 2-3 ghante roz kaafi hain shuru mein

options.name: Data Entry / Typing Work
options.whatIsIt: Basic computer typing jobs jo ghar se ya local offices mein milti hain. Reliable income but scope limited hai — isse sirf short-term earning ke liye use karo.
options.whoFor: Jo students computer basics jaante hain aur stable part-time income chahte hain while studying.
options.leadsTo: Office assistant roles, Freelance data work — but long-term mein skills upgrade karna zaroori hai

options.name: Tally / Basic Accounting
options.whatIsIt: Tally software seekhna aur small businesses ki bookkeeping karna. Commerce stream ke saath zyada fits karta hai but koi bhi seekh sakta hai.
options.whoFor: Jo students numbers aur business operations mein interest rakhte hain.
options.leadsTo: Accounts assistant jobs, Freelance bookkeeping, Aage B.Com / CA path

options.name: Mobile Phone Repair
options.whatIsIt: Phones ki basic repair — screen, battery, software issues fix karna. Short course karke local dukaan ya ghar se kaam shuru ho sakta hai.
options.whoFor: Jo students hands-on technical kaam mein comfortable hain aur jaldi earning chahte hain.
options.leadsTo: Mobile repair shop, Freelance repair work, Aage electronics business

guide.closingMessage: Yeh guide save kar lo aur apne parents/teachers se discuss karo. Jab aap 12th pass kar lo, SkillKite pe wapas aana — tab hum detailed career roadmap banake denge. Apne dost ko bhi share karo — unhe bhi help mil sakti hai. 🪁
